query.value: @concat('SELECT ContentDocumentId, ContentDocument.LatestPublishedVersionId, ContentDocument.Title, LinkedEntityId FROM ContentDocumentLink WHERE LinkedEntityId IN (SELECT Id FROM ', pipeline().parameters.ObjectName, ')')
